description: Lab 6 PQC self-validation vectors. ML-DSA and ML-KEM are randomized/library-managed, so the tests validate key generation, sign/verify, encaps/decaps, tamper rejection, and shared-secret mismatch rather than comparing fixed byte strings.

tests.name: ML-DSA-44 sign verify and tamper rejection
ML-DSA-65 sign verify and tamper rejection
